use_cases: Display customer testimonials in a swipeable carousel on landing pages
Showcase social proof with drag-to-navigate interaction
Create an interactive testimonials section with smooth card transitions
ai_summary: A testimonial carousel component featuring drag-to-swipe navigation between customer testimonial cards. Built with Framer Motion for smooth animations, supports navigation arrows and dot indicators. Includes dark mode styling and works across desktop and mobile platforms with touch and mouse input.
